specific_question: By Q2 2026, how many training sessions will Olivia Martinez's asset management team complete on the new lifecycle-tracking software at Elexion Automotive?
answer: According to Elexion Automotive's internal HR and IT team projections published on October 14, 2025, Olivia's team is expected to complete 28 sessions on the specialized lifecycle-tracking software between April 30 and June 30, 2026.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Elexion Automotive apply digital twins enhanced with AI-driven digital engineering capabilities to enable scalable customization of EV models for mid-income families, while maintaining sustainable resource usage and reducing production costs?
